label: Futures Table
description: Perpetual and dated futures with funding rate, basis, volume, and open interest per contract.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: Widget file does not import from lib/mocks/.

0.6.note: Context exposes no isLoading field; data is mock-generated synchronously; loading state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

0.7.note: Empty guard: futureRows.length === 0 renders a message; non-crypto case already renders informational text.

0.8.note: Context exposes no error field; error state cannot be wired at widget level without context changes.

l0.notes: 0.6/0.8 partial — isLoading/error not in OptionsDataContextValue; blocked on BP-5.

1.1.note: Widget reads futureRows, isCrypto, asset, setSelectedInstrument, setSelectedFuture exclusively from useOptionsData().

1.2.note: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() at line 130; scopedWatchlists filtered by globalScope.organizationIds.

1.3.note: Org filter changes scopedWatchlists; asset data driven by watchlist selection which is org-scoped.

1.4.note: No client filter applicable to futures table rows.

1.5.note: No strategy filter applicable to futures table.

1.6.note: Empty organizationIds returns all DEFAULT_WATCHLISTS (context line 275 condition).

1.7.note: ASSETS/SPOT_PRICES in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — mock fixture data, acceptable for current stage.

l1.notes: All data flows via useOptionsData(); scope wired via globalScope in context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time funding/basis), paper ✓ (simulated fills), batch N/A for crypto futures (only crypto asset class supported).

3.2.note: Context reads mode from useExecutionMode() at context line 129.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same UI, simulated contract selection and fills.

3.6.note: No WebSocket/interval in widget file; futures data computed synchronously from mock in context.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4 require human verification (batch mode disables row selection / order entry downstream).

4.1.note: No dead onClick handlers in widget file.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 require human walkthrough (row selection, FuturesTab scroll, contract detail).

5.1.note: Target strategies: futures-basis-trading, futures-calendar-spread. Widget drives futures-trade-panel via setSelectedFuture/setSelectedInstrument. Crypto only (isCrypto guard).

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 6 tests covering crypto/TradFi render paths, empty-state guard, trade-panel docking. See tests/widgets/options/futures-table.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file.

7.2.note: No mock data imports in widget file.

7.3.note: Widget file is 32 lines; well within 500-line limit.

7.4.note: OptionsFuturesTableWidget PascalCase; file kebab-case; onPick camelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No security anti-patterns in widget file.

7.7.note: onPick useCallback has stable deps [futureRows, setSelectedFuture, setSelectedInstrument]. No inline objects in deps.

8.1.note: No text-[...] or fontSize= in widget file.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing tokens in widget file.

8.3.note: Widget delegates to FuturesTab from shared trading panel; informational paragraphs use text-xs text-muted-foreground.

8.4.note: Agent grep: no bare div onClick, no img without alt, no unlabeled input in widget file. Human keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Trade panel is docked inside futures-table as a bottom pane (WU-3, 2026-04-22) — rendered when selectedFuture is set.

relationships.notes: Futures table + docked TradePanel. Futures pick sets selectedFuture + selectedInstrument. Crypto-only (isCrypto guard renders informational message for TradFi).

dataContract.notes: Currently driven by synchronous mock (generateFuturesData). Production will stream funding/mark via WebSocket from Deribit.

gaps: TradFi futures not in scope (isCrypto guard blocks TradFi)
coverage.notes: Crypto perp + dated futures only; TradFi path renders informational message.

knownIssues: context does not expose isLoading or error fields — loading/error states at widget level require context update
FuturesTab sub-component imports directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock (outside widget file scope)

findings.description: options-futures-table-widget.tsx — context has no isLoading field; loading state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (isLoading field) — blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.description: options-futures-table-widget.tsx — context has no error field; error state not wirable at widget level
findings.deferReason: Requires OptionsDataContextValue update (error field) — blocked on BP-5 data wiring.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
